suspicious_activity.narrative: Customer Jacqueline Rodriguez (CUST_0111) with a high risk rating, conducted large transactions with no clear patterns of suspicious activity. Notably, in July 2025, there were significant wire transfers including a credit of $76,517.25 (2025-07-29) and debits totaling $49,517.51 (2025-07-30 to 2025-07-31).
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: The customer has a high risk rating and large transactions, but there are no clear patterns of suspicious activity. The transactions are diverse and appear to be related to ordinary business and personal expenses.
